items.title: IRNova/NovaRadar — Nova Radar is a desktop IP scanner built with Go + React. It scans Cloudflare IP ranges from multiple selectable sources, performs real two-phase verification (TCP + TLS handshake), and outputs working IPs sorted by latency. Built by Nova Proxy Group.
